name: Smoky Corn Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cubed cooked chicken or turkey
1 cup Diced or coarsely shredded smoked cheese (Vermont cheddar or Gouda)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam kernels until tender-crisp. Cool.
2. Mix with chicken, cheese, olives, onion and red bell pepper.
3. Mix mayonnaise, sour cream, salt and pepper.
4. Fold into corn mixture.
5. Chill several hours to combine flavors.
